data.title: Eqva Raises NOK 500 Million in Bond Issue to Fund Growth and Refinancing
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Havyard Group ASA ( (DE:1H2) ) is now available.

Eqva ASA has completed a NOK 500 million four-year senior secured bond issue, priced at 3‑month NIBOR plus 7.75%, to strengthen its balance sheet and support strategic initiatives. The net proceeds will be used to refinance existing debt, repay a seller’s credit, fund capital expenditures and future acquisitions, and for general corporate purposes, a move that underpins the company’s acquisition-driven growth strategy and aims to reinforce its financial flexibility and industrial services platform, with Arctic Securities and Nordea acting as joint lead managers on the transaction.

More about Havyard Group ASA

EQVA ASA is a Norwegian full-service industrial services provider built around long-term ownership of complementary industrial companies. It serves major customers in smelting, process industry, aquaculture, maritime and offshore sectors, offering engineering and mechanical solutions, steel structures, piping and tank systems, ventilation, power and automation, as well as hydropower development and operation. The group pursues an asset-light, cash-generative model that combines organic growth with targeted acquisitions, with portfolio companies operating autonomously within a common governance and support framework, and employs more than 660 specialists across key industrial regions in Norway.

Average Trading Volume: 378,071

Current Market Cap: NOK263.5M

See more insights into 1H2 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Mindbio Therapeutics Corp. ( (TSE:MBIO) ) just unveiled an update.

MindBio Therapeutics has listed its common shares for trading on the OTCQB Market in the United States, a move that broadens its access to U.S. investors and aligns with a roadshow promoting its AI-powered drug and alcohol intoxication detection technology. The company recently launched its Booze AI app, which uses an AI model trained on more than 50 million data points to assess alcohol intoxication and estimate blood alcohol concentration from voice alone, and is now developing enterprise-grade and platform-level solutions targeting workplace safety, call centres, mental health, and law enforcement, potentially strengthening its commercial prospects and competitive positioning in AI-driven health monitoring.

More about Mindbio Therapeutics Corp.

MindBio Therapeutics Corp. is a Vancouver-based biotechnology company focused on drug and alcohol research and the development of AI- and machine-learning-driven health prediction technologies. Leveraging speech analytics, it has created voice-based models to detect and predict drug and alcohol intoxication, and is building an enterprise platform aimed at applications in workplaces, law enforcement, mental health, and telehealth.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

data.title: Moderna’s New Variant-Focused COVID Booster Study: What Investors Should Watch
data.description:
Moderna (MRNA) announced an update on their ongoing clinical study.

Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Study Overview: Moderna (MRNA) is running a late-stage study titled “A Phase 3b/4, Open-label Study to Assess the Immunogenicity and Safety of mRNA COVID-19 Variant-containing Vaccine Formulations.” The goal is to see how well updated versions of its COVID-19 vaccine trigger an immune response against both current and newly emerging variants of SARS-CoV-2, while also tracking safety. For investors, this work is important because it supports Moderna’s push to keep its COVID franchise relevant as the virus evolves.

Intervention/Treatment: The study tests updated versions of Moderna’s original mRNA-1273 shot. Participants receive a single intramuscular injection of one of several variant-focused formulations (mRNA-1273.167, mRNA-1273.712, or mRNA-1273.251). These are designed to boost protection against specific, newer COVID variants and help keep vaccine performance aligned with the changing virus.

Study Design: This is an interventional trial with one treatment group and no placebo or comparison arm. All participants receive one of the Moderna variant-containing shots, and the study is open-label, meaning both the doctors and participants know which vaccine they get. The main aim is prevention, focused on measuring immune response and safety rather than comparing to another product.

Study Timeline: The study was first submitted on 3 September 2024, signaling the start of formal regulatory and operational activity. Primary completion, when the key immune response data are collected, will come ahead of the estimated overall completion date (not yet specified in the record), when all follow-up and analysis end. The most recent update was posted on 21 October 2025, which shows that Moderna is actively maintaining the protocol and that the program remains current.

Market Implications: For Moderna, positive immune-response and safety data from this Phase 3b/4 study would strengthen the case for recurring COVID booster demand and support revenue visibility beyond 2025. It may also bolster Moderna’s reputation as a fast follower on variant updates, an area where it competes directly with Pfizer/BioNTech and other vaccine makers. Any signs that the updated shots are especially strong against new variants could improve investor sentiment around the durability of the COVID franchise, while safety issues or weak responses could pressure the stock. More broadly, steady progress here may help sustain market confidence in the mRNA platform, which underpins Moderna’s wider pipeline in respiratory and other vaccines.

The study is currently ongoing and updated, with full details available on the ClinicalTrials.gov portal under NCT06585241.

To learn more about MRNA’s potential, visit the Moderna drug pipeline page.

data.title: Vortex Energy Advances Canadian Exploration Portfolio and Resets AGM to February
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Vortex Energy Corp. ( (TSE:VRTX) ) is now available.

Vortex Energy Corp. reported that 2025 was a year of significant technical progress across its Canadian project portfolio, highlighted by detailed geotechnical and geophysical work at the Robinsons River Salt Project in Newfoundland & Labrador and validation of uranium targets at its Fire Eye project in Saskatchewan. At Robinsons River, the company advanced characterization of the salt system through university-led laboratory studies and completed fieldwork for an Ambient Noise Tomography program, which will be integrated into an updated subsurface model in 2026 to guide potential drilling and further evaluation. At Fire Eye, Vortex refined its understanding of historical uranium showings and modern geophysical targets, with plans this year to sharpen target ranking and design follow-up field programs, underscoring a methodical, data-driven approach to de-risking its projects. The company also disclosed that its annual general meeting has been adjourned to February 13, 2026, after the initial session failed to reach quorum, a procedural delay that may concentrate investor attention on governance and shareholder engagement alongside the firm’s technical milestones.

More about Vortex Energy Corp.

Vortex Energy Corp. is an exploration-stage company focused on acquiring and advancing early-stage energy-related mineral projects, including salt formations suited to underground energy storage and uranium prospects in Canada. The company’s portfolio currently includes the Robinsons River Salt Project in Newfoundland & Labrador and the Fire Eye uranium project in Saskatchewan, positioning it within the emerging clean energy infrastructure and nuclear fuel supply chains.

Average Trading Volume: 16,978

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$8.96M

Find detailed analytics on VRTX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: MKS Plans Comprehensive Capital Structure Refinancing With Lenders
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from MKS ( (MKSI) ) is now available.

MKS Inc. plans to meet with existing and prospective lenders on January 22, 2026 to discuss a comprehensive refinancing of its capital structure, including replacing its existing $2.2 billion term loan with a new approximately $0.9 billion term loan maturing in 2033, refinancing its existing €0.6 billion term loan with a new facility also maturing in 2033, and enlarging its revolving credit facility from $675 million to $1 billion while extending that facility’s maturity to 2031. The contemplated transactions, which are subject to market conditions and may not close, are designed to be leverage-neutral while extending debt maturities and reducing interest expense, and the company’s accompanying lender presentation emphasizes the use of non-GAAP financial metrics to analyze ongoing business trends and compares past periods, underscoring management’s focus on capital structure optimization amid its exposure to cyclical semiconductor and industrial end markets and risks linked to its Atotech chemicals technology acquisition.

The most recent analyst rating on (MKSI) stock is a Buy with a $227.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on MKS stock, see the MKSI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MKSI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MKSI is a Outperform.

Overall score reflects strong financial performance (especially cash flow) and a technically strong uptrend, reinforced by a positive earnings update and steady guidance. The main offset is valuation risk (high P/E, low yield) alongside overbought technical readings that increase near-term volatility.

To see Spark’s full report on MKSI stock, click here.

More about MKS

MKS Inc. provides foundational technology solutions for leading-edge semiconductor manufacturing, electronics and packaging, and specialty industrial applications, generating $3.83 billion in revenue over the twelve months ended in the third quarter of 2025.
